summary: Hyunwoo and his companion successfully defeat the vampire noble Viscount Lawton Seynod using divine power and a series of powerful combat skills. Following the victory, Hyunwoo earns a prestigious title and receives valuable loot, which he generously offers to his companion. Later, Hyunwoo prepares for a high-profile streaming session with Hollywood action star Dwayne Evans, who is a fan of his virtual persona, the 'Alley Boss'.
key_moments: Hyunwoo and his companion defeat Viscount Lawton Seynod.
Hyunwoo earns the 'Vampire Viscount Slayer' title and receives legendary equipment.
Hyunwoo prepares to meet actor Dwayne Evans in the virtual arena for a streaming session.
